correction.source_role: Txtbngsntnscrnshot.txt was supplied as machine-readable text needed to interpret the screenshot-carried context, not merely as a standalone taxonomy document.
correction.source_presence: The Fracture Markdown was included in the supplied bundle and later directly read by the reviewer.
correction.existing_work: Fork and Ryan William Feller had already begun applying reflexive scrutiny and preserving claim standing; the review should not represent that discipline as newly introduced by the reviewer.

non_claims: The correction does not require automatic acceptance of every user interpretation.
The correction does not validate the Fracture technical claims.
The correction does not canonize the candidate taxonomy.
